known_issues.description: CoreAnimation-backed text rendering degraded — animations flattened
known_issues.workaround: Display quality acceptable for editing but animations are disabled

known_issues.description: Font panel may not display system-installed fonts

workarounds.description: Use File → Open with explicit encoding if document fails to load
Font panel limited — use system font configuration instead

notes: Launch successful. Core editing and saving functional. Rich text rendering functional but animations are disabled per CoreAnimation flattening strategy. App launches but some subsystems unavailable (partial state).
